entry.title: Nearly 4,000 NASA employees opt to leave agency through deferred resignation program
entry.quote: On Monday, more than 300 current and former NASA employees signed and sent a letter known as the "Voyager Declaration" to interim NASA administrator Sean Duffy, criticizing "rapid and wasteful changes" at the agency that they say include cuts to programs and research.

entry.title: Google Spoofed Via DKIM Replay Attack: A Technical Breakdown
entry.quote: What followed was a deep dive into the message to determine whether it was a genuine communication or a cleverly crafted phishing attempt. The email was convincing enough to create real concern, and that’s what makes this story worth sharing.

entry.title: Mammalian Cell Evolution Machine May Bring New Vaccines
entry.quote: “The general method of directed evolution is cyclic, where we generate diversity in a gene of interest, select for fitness against a challenge, and amplify successful genetic variants to repeat the process. This is all done with the goal of directing a gene towards a desired outcome,”

entry.title: What to know about ToolShell, the SharePoint threat under mass exploitation
entry.quote: The vulnerability, which is formally tracked as CVE-2025-53770, enables unauthenticated remote code execution on servers running SharePoint. The ease of exploitation, the damage it causes, and the ongoing targeting of it in the wild have earned it a severity rating of 9.8 out of a possible 10.

entry.title: Revisiting Moneyball
entry.quote: Whether the 2002 A’s succeeded primarily through analytics or traditional talent is less important than the broader principle they demonstrated: analytics can reveal value that conventional wisdom misses. They also showed the power of intelligence, creativity, and sheer persistence in overcoming financial disadvantage.
